examples.name: basic-alpine
examples.description: Run a simple Alpine Linux shell

examples.name: echo-hello
examples.description: Run a single command and exit

examples.name: limited-resources
examples.description: Run with 128MB memory and 25% CPU limit

examples.name: detached-with-ports
examples.description: Run a web server in background with port forwarding
examples.command: sudo ./minibox run -d -p 8080:80 --name web alpine-minirootfs-3.19.0-x86_64.tar.gz /bin/sh -c 'echo hello > /tmp/index.html && httpd -f -p 80 -h /tmp'

examples.name: with-volumes
examples.description: Run with a host directory mounted
